query:
-- Status atual da Graziele
SELECT 
  u.id, u.name, u.status, u.limiteDiarioLeads,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN l.status IN ('aguardando_atendimento','em_atendimento') AND l.naLixeira = 0 THEN 1 END) as leads_ativos,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN l.status = 'aguardando_atendimento' AND l.naLixeira = 0 THEN 1 END) as aguardando,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN l.status = 'em_atendimento' AND l.naLixeira = 0 THEN 1 END) as em_atendimento
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN leads l ON l.corretorId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%raziel%' OR u.email LIKE '%raziel%'
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.status, u.limiteDiarioLeads;

-- Últimos leads recebidos pela Graziele (log de distribuição)
SELECT dl.createdAt, dl.tipo, dl.motivo, l.nome as lead_nome, l.status as lead_status
FROM distribution_log dl
JOIN users u ON dl.corretorId = u.id
JOIN leads l ON dl.leadId = l.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%raziel%' OR u.email LIKE '%raziel%'
ORDER BY dl.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
